title: gayophytum diffusum subsp. diffusum
intro: Gayophytum diffusum subsp. diffusum, also known as Spreading Bedstraw or Diffuse Bedstraw, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Gayophytum diffusum subsp. diffusum typically involve infusion or decoction of the leaves and stems, which can be used as a tea or tincture to support overall well-being.
